name: Ferplast Cat Collar 5628
description: Key Features: • Cat Safe Safety System: Equipped with a specially designed clip closure that automatically opens under abnormal pressure, reducing the risk of choking or entrapment. A crucial safety feature for adventurous cats. • Durable Polyester Construction: Made from high-quality, lightweight polyester that’s built to last. The collar is available in bright, cheerful colors and patterns. (Please note: Specific colors cannot be selected; items are shipped based on stock availability.) • Integrated Metal Bell: A small metal bell gently rings with your cat’s movements, helping you easily locate them anywhere in your home or yard. • Adjustable Fit: Fully adjustable to comfortably fit your cat’s neck without restricting movement. Designed for daily wear with maximum comfort. Benefits: • Enhances your cat’s safety with an intelligent breakaway design. • Helps you monitor your cat’s whereabouts through the bell’s sound. • Offers a fun, colorful accessory that matches your cat’s personality. • A great choice for cats who explore both indoors and outdoors. Give your cat the freedom they love with the safety you trust. The FERPLAST GAT 5628 Cat Collar is a reliable and stylish option for any pet owner looking to combine function, comfort, and design in one simple accessory.
